title: Musk says Optimus will be the hardest product Tesla has ever scaled
summary: Last year Musk said he would be “ shocked ” if Tesla was not producing 100,000 Optimus robots per month within five years, and in January 2025 he projected 50,000 to 100,000 units for 2026.
caption: output/2026-07-23/musk-says-optimus-will-be-the-hardest-product-tesla-has-ever-scaled.txt
